name: studio.trigger_seo_audit
description: Kick off a fresh SEO audit for an Actium Studio site. Returns an audit_id; pair with studio.get_seo_report to read results.
whenToUse: After a site-wide content update, trigger a fresh audit so the next get_seo_report reflects the new state.
Pre-launch checklist: run an audit after scaffolding so publish gates can validate against current issues.
Periodic sweep: scheduled CI job kicks off a weekly audit per managed site.
whenNotToUse: Caller only needs cached data from the last audit — use studio.get_seo_report directly; triggering is expensive.
An audit is already in flight (last one ran <5min ago) — duplicate triggers are rate-limited server-side.
Caller wants to edit SEO fields (title, meta description) — use studio.update_page; auditing is read-only analysis.
